INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE: Owo ko to fun iṣowo yii
USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: Olumulo pelu adirẹsi wọleti yii ti wa
SLIPPAGE_TOO_HIGH: Iyọkuro ti kọja iye ti a gba laaye
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Awọn ibeere pọju, jọwọ gbiyanju lẹẹkansi nigbamii
FORBIDDEN: O ko ni igbanilaaye lati ṣe iṣe yii
TRADE_ACCESS_DENIED: O ko ni wiwọle si iṣowo yii
PREMIUM_SUBSCRIPTION_REQUIRED: O nilo ẹbọ aladanla lati wọle si ami yii
SIGNAL_NOT_PREMIUM: Ami yii kii ṣe ami aladanla
STALE_PRICE: Alaye owo ti di atijọ, ko le lo fun iṣowo
INSUFFICIENT_LIQUIDITY: Omi ọja ko to fun iṣowo yii. O kere ju: {minimum}
QUOTE_DEPTH_TOO_LOW: Ijinle iwe aṣẹ ko to fun iwọn iṣowo yii
